title: teucrium aureum subsp. angustifolium
intro: Teucrium aureum subsp. angustifolium, also known as Narrow-leaved Golden Germander, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Narrow-leaved Golden Germander include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health. This plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be used in herbal tinctures and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
